name: Clinic
tagline: Targeted, time-bounded intervention. Fast, focused, expert-led.
description: The lightest-touch modality. A clinic is a defined engagement with a clear scope and endpoint: a session, an audit, a sprint, a coaching check-in. The value is speed and accessibility. This is often how new clients enter the relationship.
distinguishingFeature: Clear scope and endpoint. Fast, accessible, expert-led.
